sample.claimText: Carborundum
sample.description: Information film about the production process of carborundum (silicon carbide, a synthetic mineral).

sample.claimText: Léonce Perret: The ABC of Love
sample.creator: Léonce Perret
sample.description: A romance between the playwright Harry Bryant and the homeless and illiterate Kate.

sample.claimText: Clarence G. Badger: The Floor Below
sample.creator: Clarence G. Badger
sample.description: Romantic comedy about a journalist who, disguised as a pickpocket, lets herself be taken into a house of correction. She exposes the true criminal and receives a marriage proposal from the director of the house.

sample.claimText: Kenean Buel: The Chest of Fortune
sample.creator: Kenean Buel
sample.description: A romantic drama in which the orphan Jack turns out to be from a good family, which means that he can marry his beloved Kathe. But Kathe’s lover is jealous, and tries to keep Jack at bay.

sample.claimText: George Edwardes Hall: Absinthe
sample.creator: George Edwardes Hall
sample.description: A silent melodrama about an artist who finds out in time the personal and social damage that his alcohol addiction causes.

sample.claimText: Francis Ford: The Craving
sample.creator: Francis Ford
sample.description: An Indian scholar tries to get an American colleague, who is working on a powerful explosive, under his control by using his drinking problem.

sample.claimText: James W. Horne: De Vrouwelijke detective
sample.creator: James W. Horne
sample.description: Episode in a series of two-act films in which a “society girl” is employed as a special investigator by the police. In each self-contained episode, she works on several cases.

sample.claimText: Uit het leven van twee chimpansees. Napoleon en Sally houden de kogels tegen.
sample.description: Napoleon is called up to the army, and says goodbye to Sally, and to the people in the film studio. He leaves. But Sally quickly chases after him, and together they arrive at "Fort Skiddoo". The chaotic army unit is composed of men in old-fashioned uniforms and a woman. The chimp Napoleon has to stand guard, and sees the enemy. He sounds the alarm. In a frantic battle, Sally is injured, and Napoleon ensures that the enemy retreats. Sally is carried inside, and she is hungry more than anything el

sample.claimText: The Hop Smugglers
sample.description: A short, silent action film about a female journalist who does research into smuggling for a sensational newspaper article.

sample.claimText: Robert Z. Leonard: The Delicious Little Devil
sample.creator: Robert Z. Leonard
sample.description: A romantic and comic drama in which the unemployed Kitty McGuire pretends to be the infamous dancer Gloria de Moine so as to get a job at a local dance café. There she falls in love with Jimmy Calhoun, the son of a millionaire.

sample.claimText: Harry A. Pollard: A Joke on Jane
sample.creator: Harry A. Pollard
sample.description: A short comedy about spouses who deceive each other in regard to a break-in, break, but in the meanwhile a real break-in actually occurs.

sample.claimText: Jesse D. Hampton: The End of the Game
sample.creator: Jesse D. Hampton
sample.description: A silent Western about a love story that takes place during the gold rush. The gold prospector Burke Allister falls in love with Mary, who believes the slanderous lies that have been spread about Burke by his competitor. When Mary desperately wants to plunge into the abyss, Burke is there just in time to save her. Frank Miller and his sister arrive in the California gold town of Brazo, where Frank is “undressed” in the gambling den of his arch-villain Dan Middleton. The gentleman gambler Burk

sample.claimText: V. Kapff: February - March 1933
sample.creator: V. Kapff
sample.description: Compilation of fragments with images of emperor Wilhelm II in Huis Doorn and of the de sluices near IJmuiden.

sample.claimText: Maurits H. Binger: Het Geheim van Delft
sample.creator: Maurits H. Binger
sample.description: Jan Vogel, foreman at the Van Haaften pottery, is busy with a new process for painting porcelain, but so far his experiments have failed. His employer, also in financial difficulties, cannot give him more money. Van Haaften objects to the relationship between his son Leo and Jan's daughter Annie. Jan promises to try to keep them apart. Annie, who earns a living playing the piano in a cabaret, is pestered by her cousin Willem, a rascal whom Vogel has dismissed from the factory and who wants reven

sample.claimText: Alfred Machin: Joachim Goethal et le secret de l'acier
sample.creator: Alfred Machin
sample.description: The Holland National Steel Foundry discovers the secret for the manufacture of a wonderful steel. Piet Goethal, an old workman of the foundry, has two prides, the steel works and his son Joachim. The latter is in love with Maria, the daughter of Alsteen, the local beer-seller, but she refuses to marry him as he has no money. Consequently Joachim falls an easy prey to a foreign secret service agent who bribes him to steal the secret formula. He is disturbed in the act and pursued through the work

sample.claimText: William Humphrey: The Good in the Worst of Us
sample.creator: William Humphrey
sample.description: Crime drama in which Minnie is haunted by her past. She flees from Jim to escape from his bad influence. During a burglary Jim shoots a man and insists on Minnie to help him get away from there. Minnie's husband is suspicious, for which Jim eventually has to pay with his life.

sample.claimText: William Worthington: His Birthright
sample.creator: William Worthington
sample.description: A social drama about Yukio, who came to the United States illegally, and who is used by a gang of spies. He steals secret documents from an admiral, but when he realizes what he has done, he demands to get the documents back. In the battle that follows, the admiral and police agents come to Yukio’s aid. It then turns out that he is the long-lost son of the admiral.

sample.claimText: William V. Ranous: The Anarchist's Wife
sample.creator: William V. Ranous
sample.description: A political crime film in which a militant, anarchist father allows his political ideals to prevail over human dignity. The father uses his young daughter to carry out an attack on Princess Louise. After his wife foils the attack and he is arrested by the police, he steps back from his fanaticism and repents.

sample.claimText: Jack en de boonenstaak
sample.description: Based on an English fairy tale in which poverty forces Jack to sell their cow, but in exchange gets beans instead of money. Eventually he uses the magic beans to wind up in the castle of the giant.

sample.claimText: Keizer Wilhelm in Eijsden
sample.description: Reportage about the commotion at the Eijsden train station after the arrival of Emperor Wilhelm II This film must have been made on November 10, 1918, the day that the German Emperor Wilhelm II came to the Netherlands after he was deposed by the army. The footage was shot some distance from the all the commotion that the Emperor's arrival caused at Eijsden's train station. Pending official approval to let Wilhelm cross the German-Dutch border, several officers walk along the platform of the sta
